raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Rhetorical deflection of an objection by universalizing risk and challenging selective criticism",
  "implicit_claims": ["The thing in question offers no real danger", "Every usable thing carries some danger", "An objection based solely on danger is invalid unless applied universally"],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent as a concessive rhetorical move that both denies and hypothetically grants danger to shift burden",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The debate concerns whether danger alone justifies rejection, comparable risks exist across alternatives, and specific risk magnitudes are not at issue",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The objected-to item has distinctive or unacceptable dangers not shared by alternatives, or the question substitutes for addressing quantified risks"
}
